Argument.Name: FILEPATH
Argument.Description: The fully qualified file path for the target json file to minify.

Option.Description: The target folder where the minified file will be written. Defaults to the current folder.

Command.Name: file
Command.Description: Default command that minifies the specified json file.

Argument.Name: FILEPATH
Argument.Description: The fully qualified file path for the target json file to minify.

Option.Description: The target folder where the minified file will be written. Defaults to the current folder.

Command.Name: folder
Command.Description: Command that minifies all of the json files in the specified folder.

Argument.Name: FOLDERPATH
Argument.Description: The fully qualified target directory/folder path to search for json files to minify.

Option.Description: The target folder where the minified files will be written. Defaults to the current folder.
